mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pur_order ( id, bill_no, bill_date, supplier_id, supplier_name, warehouse_id, buyer_id, buyer_name, order_type, pay_type, currency, exchange_rate, total_qty, total_amount, tax_amount, total_amount_tax, paid_amount, bill_status, delivery_date, source_bill_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{billNo}, #{billDate}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{warehouseId}, #{buyerId}, #{buyerName}, #{orderType}, #{payType}, #{currency}, #{exchangeRate}, #{totalQty}, #{totalAmount}, #{taxAmount}, #{totalAmountTax}, #{paidAmount}, #{billStatus}, #{deliveryDate}, #{sourceBillId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE pur_order SET bill_no = #{et.billNo}, bill_date = #{et.billDate}, supplier_id = #{et.supplierId}, supplier_name = #{et.supplierName}, warehouse_id = #{et.warehouseId}, buyer_id = #{et.buyerId}, buyer_name = #{et.buyerName}, order_type = #{et.orderType}, pay_type = #{et.payType}, currency = #{et.currency}, exchange_rate = #{et.exchangeRate}, total_qty = #{et.totalQty}, total_amount = #{et.totalAmount}, tax_amount = #{et.taxAmount}, total_amount_tax = #{et.totalAmountTax}, paid_amount = #{et.paidAmount}, bill_status = #{et.billStatus}, delivery_date = #{et.deliveryDate}, source_bill_id = #{et.sourceBillId}, remark = #{et.remark}, update_by = #{et.updateBy}, update_time = #{et.updateTime} WHERE id = #{et.id}
